race.comment: MAZZINI (1) was backed off the map at Hobart but didn't finish it off beaten 2.3L (vet cleared). Brought commanding form to that and riding the speed from an inside barrier, he rates to bounce back. SWIFT FORCE (6) comes out of the same race where she was beaten a half-length from the front. The promising filly will be fitter again and draws to give a big sight. PRINCE OF KHATUN (2) placed at Hobart this trip and then won there coming back to 1000m. Keeps the top hoop and maps for a soft run. A chance to go back-to-back. GEEGEES MISSILE (8) just missed heavily-backed in the same race, and she has claims as well.
